publicationStmt.publisher: manuscripta.se: A Digital Catalogue of Medieval and Early Modern Manuscripts in Sweden

msDesc.head: John Wyclif, Theological and Philosphical Treatises copied by Jan Hus

summary.p:
Stephens ascribes Tractatus de ideis and Replicacio de universalibus to Jan Hus, cf Stephens (1847)
. However Dziewicki (via previous research) argues convincingly that the first text is written by Wycliffe, while the other is by an unknown author, cf Dziewicki (1902)
. According to Schieche (1979) there are 24 notes in Czech throughout the manuscript, found on:
. The glosses are transcribed and translated into English in Dziewicki (1902)
.
